title: Enforcing Pod Security Standards — Third-party alternatives
text:
Other alternatives for enforcing security profiles are being developed in the Kubernetes
ecosystem:
Kubewarden
.
Kyverno
.
OPA Gatekeeper
.
The decision to go with a
built-in
solution (e.g. PodSecurity admission controller) versus a
third-party tool is entirely dependent on your own situation. When evaluating any solution,
trust of your supply chain is crucial. Ultimately, using
any
of the aforementioned approaches
will be better than doing nothing.
